title: My First English World Game Zone
source: Generated from approved unit runtime and linked master dictionary

games.title: Meaning Match
games.description: Match each unit word to its approved child-friendly meaning.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A round, crunchy fruit that is red or green.
rounds.explanation: apple: A round, crunchy fruit that is red or green.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A round toy you can kick, throw or bounce.
rounds.explanation: ball: A round toy you can kick, throw or bounce.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A soft pet with whiskers that purrs and chases mice.
rounds.explanation: cat: A soft pet with whiskers that purrs and chases mice.

games.title: Spelling Builder
games.description: Choose letter tiles to build important unit words.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: A flat top on legs where we eat or write.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: A seat with a back and four legs for one person.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: A smooth white board the teacher writes on at school.

games.title: Sentence Puzzle
games.description: Put unit words into the correct sentence order.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: Musa eats an apple at break.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: The cow eats grass in the field.

rounds.prompt: Build the complete model sentence.
rounds.answer: My ball is red and white.

games.title: Language Choice
games.description: Choose the form that makes the unit language accurate.

rounds.prompt: Which one is an animal that lives on a farm?
rounds.explanation: A goat is a farm animal; a bus, a pencil and a river are not animals.

rounds.prompt: Which body part helps you hear the call to prayer?
rounds.explanation: We hear with our ears; eyes see, hands touch and the nose smells.

rounds.prompt: Which sentence tells a safe thing to do in the town?
choices: Push people at the bus stop.
rounds.explanation: Stopping at a red light keeps you safe; the other actions are dangerous or unkind.

games.title: Reading Detective
games.description: Use unit evidence to solve each reading clue.

rounds.prompt: Where did Amal find her letters and family pictures?
rounds.explanation: Review the unit text evidence: In her learning folder

rounds.prompt: How many favourite pieces must you choose?
rounds.explanation: Review the unit text evidence: Three

rounds.prompt: What two things do you add to your book pages?
choices: 'This is my mum. I love my family.'
rounds.explanation: Review the unit text evidence: Labels and short patterns

games.title: Speaking Quest
games.description: Listen, record, review and submit useful unit language.

rounds.prompt: Capstone speaking 1
Capstone speaking 3
rounds.target: Show a favourite page and say why you chose it.

rounds.prompt: Capstone speaking 5
rounds.target: Describe one picture from your folder in two ways.

games.title: Word Order Race
games.description: Arrange unit language in a clear, accurate order.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: The hen lays an egg each day.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: The cat sleeps on my bed.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: The tiny chick follows the hen.

games.title: Definition Dash
games.description: Choose the approved meaning before moving to the next clue.

rounds.prompt: What does 'mum' mean in this unit?
choices: A warm, friendly name that children use for their own mother.
A round, crunchy fruit that is red or green.
The woman who looks after you and loves you at home.
rounds.answer: A warm, friendly name that children use for their own mother.
rounds.explanation: mum: A warm, friendly name that children use for their own mother.

rounds.prompt: What does 'father' mean in this unit?
choices: A round, crunchy fruit that is red or green.
The woman who looks after you and loves you at home.
The man who looks after you and loves you at home.
rounds.answer: The man who looks after you and loves you at home.
rounds.explanation: father: The man who looks after you and loves you at home.

rounds.prompt: What does 'mother' mean in this unit?
choices: A big farm animal that gives us milk.
The woman who looks after you and loves you at home.
A round, crunchy fruit that is red or green.
rounds.answer: The woman who looks after you and loves you at home.
rounds.explanation: mother: The woman who looks after you and loves you at home.

games.title: Word Type Power
games.description: Identify how each vocabulary word works in English.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'bus'?
rounds.explanation: bus is used as a noun in this dictionary sense.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'car'?
rounds.explanation: car is used as a noun in this dictionary sense.

rounds.prompt: What type of word is 'walk'?
rounds.explanation: walk is used as a noun in this dictionary sense.

games.title: Memory Pairs
games.description: Reveal tiles and connect each word with its meaning.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 1.
pairs: The woman who looks after you and loves you at home.
A big farm animal that gives us milk.
The clear drink we need every day to stay healthy.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 2.
pairs: A warm, friendly name that children use for their own mother.
A female farm bird that lays the eggs we eat.
Water falling from the clouds in many small drops.

rounds.prompt: Match vocabulary set 3.
pairs: The man who looks after you and loves you at home.
A baby bird that has just come out of its egg.
A very small round bit of liquid, like one tear.

games.title: Question Quest
games.description: Read each unit question carefully and choose the best answer.

rounds.prompt: Which word names a colour?
rounds.explanation: Blue is a colour; a bus is a vehicle, a farm is a place and hear is a sense word.

rounds.prompt: Which word names a person in a family?
rounds.explanation: Mum is a family member; the other words start with m too but they are a place, the sky and a thing.

rounds.prompt: Which word is an action you do in a ball game?
rounds.explanation: Bounce is an action with a ball; a hospital is a place, water is a liquid and a triangle is a shape.

games.title: Unit Mission
games.description: Finish with a mixed challenge across the whole unit.

rounds.prompt: Which word completes the sentence: My name ___ Aisha.
rounds.explanation: My name is one thing, so we use is; are is for more than one and am only goes with I.

rounds.prompt: Which word completes the sentence: I ___ hop on one foot.
rounds.explanation: Can tells what you are able to do; is and are do not go with I hop, and the is not a doing word.

rounds.prompt: Which one is a complete sentence?
rounds.explanation: It starts with a capital letter, makes sense and ends with a full stop; the others are just groups of words.
